author: Ouzhongyuan

manifest.author: Ouzhongyuan
manifest.description: Semantic search for Vault notes via MCP, enabling AI tools to search and read your notes.
manifest.name: Semlink

name: Semlink

releases.author: ouou365
releases.description:
## Performance & Plugin Review Fixes

### Performance
- **DB operations moved to Web Worker**: All sql.js (WASM SQLite) operations now run in a worker_threads child thread. Export, disk-write, and search of large databases no longer block the main thread.
- **chunkMarkdown moved to worker**: String chunking for large files moved to the child thread.
- **Status bar update throttled**: Reduced from 60fps to 2fps during indexing.
- **Watcher debounce optimized**: Increased from 2s to 5s.

### Bug Fixes
- **Fixed ghost index paths**: Cleaned up stale index entries from moved/deleted files.
- **Fixed status bar count flicker during incremental indexing**.

### Plugin Review Compliance
- Replaced direct style assignments with CSS classes and `setCssStyles()`.
- Replaced HTML heading elements with `Setting().setHeading()`.
- Prefixed all timers with `window.` for popout window compatibility.
- Bumped `minAppVersion` to 1.6.0 to match newer APIs used.

### Installation
Requires Obsidian 1.6.0+. Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below into your plugin directory.

releases.author: ouou365
releases.description:
## Performance & Plugin Review Fixes

### Performance
- **DB operations moved to Web Worker**: All sql.js (WASM SQLite) operations now run in a worker_threads child thread. Export, disk-write, and search of the 397MB database no longer block the main thread.
- **chunkMarkdown moved to worker**: Synchronous string chunking for large files moved to the child thread, preventing UI blocking during incremental indexing.
- **Status bar update throttled**: Reduced from 60fps to 2fps, minimizing DOM writes during indexing.
- **Watcher debounce optimized**: Increased from 2s to 5s, reducing unnecessary indexing triggers while typing.

### Bug Fixes
- **Fixed ghost index paths**: Cleaned up stale index entries left behind by moved/deleted files (database shrunk from 802MB to 404MB in testing).
- **Fixed status bar count flicker during incremental indexing**: Updating a file no longer incorrectly increments the total file count.

### Plugin Review Compliance
- Replaced direct style assignments with CSS classes and `setCssStyles()`
- Replaced HTML heading elements with `Setting().setHeading()`
- Prefixed all timers with `window.` for popout window compatibility
- Replaced `document` with `activeDocument`

### Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below into your plugin directory, or update via Obsidian community plugins.

releases.author: ouou365
releases.description:
## Major Performance Update: Eliminated Input Lag in Large Vaults

### Performance
- **DB operations moved to Web Worker**: All sql.js (WASM SQLite) operations now run in a worker_threads child thread. Export, disk-write, and search of the 397MB database no longer block the main thread — zero main-thread blocking while typing.
- **chunkMarkdown moved to worker**: Synchronous string chunking for large files moved to the child thread, preventing UI blocking during incremental indexing.
- **Status bar update throttled**: Reduced from 60fps to 2fps, minimizing DOM writes during indexing.
- **Watcher debounce optimized**: Increased from 2s to 5s, reducing unnecessary indexing triggers while typing.

### Bug Fixes
- **Fixed ghost index paths**: Cleaned up stale index entries left behind by moved/deleted files (database shrunk from 802MB to 404MB in testing).
- **Fixed status bar count flicker during incremental indexing**: Updating a file no longer incorrectly increments the total file count.

### Installation
Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below into your plugin directory, or update via Obsidian community plugins.

releases.author: ouou365
releases.description:
Performance optimization and UX improvements.

- Fix duplicate re-indexing when folders are renamed/moved
- Reduce UI lag during indexing (rAF throttling, yielding between batches)
- SQLite transaction wrapping for DB writes
- Status bar now shows "X files" with i18n support

releases.description:
## Semlink v0.3.0

WASM binary now embedded in main.js. No extra files needed.
